title: Linderniella boutiqueana
intro: Linderniella boutiqueana, also known as Linderniella, is a plant species in the family Linderniaceae, characterized by its unique foliage and vibrant blooms. The plant has been traditionally used for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may aid in treating various ailments such as wounds, fever, and respiratory issues. Bioactive constituents of Linderniella include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and alkaloids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. Herbal preparations made from Linderniella include teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are often used in traditional medicine to treat a range of health conditions.
taxonomy: Linderniella boutiqueana is a species of flowering plant in the family Linderniaceae. It belongs to the order Lamiales, which comprises various flowering plant families. Linderniella boutiqueana is further classified within the genus Linderniella. The species is native to Africa. Linderniella boutiqueana is a part of the plant kingdom, specifically within the kingdom Plantae.
